subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which the hearts of Thy servants were drawn unto the horizon of Thy revelation and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی منه اجتذبت قلوب عبادک الی افق وحیک و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for unity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
